description: Autonomous governance platform. Classify → Verify → Remediate across content, infrastructure, and AI reasoning.

bridge.description: Site Mapper v2 audit engine bridge

site-mapper.description: Classify-first SEO/GEO audit pipeline. 11 phases: classify → discover → templates → crawl → graph → contradictions → extrapolate → report.

infrastructure-controller.description: Infrastructure drift detection and remediation. Compares IaC declared state against cloud API actual state. Safety-gated with blast radius limits.

reasoning-verifier.description: RVE — Reasoning Verification Engine. Parses AI Chain-of-Thought, extracts claims/evidence/inferences, ground-truths against live data sources.

governance.description: Research (15%) + Performance (15%) + Economic (50%) + Structural (20%). Scores every finding. Gates autonomous actions by confidence, scope, impact, reversibility, and conflict.
autoFixGating: Affects template or resource group (not single anomaly)
No conflict with other detected issues

views.activityFeed: Real-time feed of auto-fixes, decisions pending, and detected issues

howHermesUsesThis.audit: POST to bridge server: curl -X POST http://localhost:3003/audit -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"url":"https://example.com"}'
howHermesUsesThis.verify: After audit completes, run RVE on any AI-generated content before publishing
howHermesUsesThis.monitor: Poll /api/dashboard/summary for health score and pending decisions
howHermesUsesThis.fix: Auto-approvable findings are executed automatically. High-risk findings appear in the dashboard for human approval.
